case_title: GEOFFREY WORKMAN VS. ST. FRANCIS BAY HOA ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WORKMAN, GEOFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT ST. FRANCIS BAY HOA C/O EUGENE BERGER CONNELL, TOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-25-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO TOM CONNELL RETURNED= RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, UNKNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JAN-28-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ST. FRANCIS BAY HOA C/O EUGENE BERGER
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO TOM CONNELL BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-25-2015 AT 1:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2015 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ST. FRANCIS BAY HOA C/O EUGENE BERGER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-25-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-25-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT ST. FRANCIS ETC. WAS REPRESENTED BY FRANK PALECKO--TREASURER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WORKMAN, GEOFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT CONNELL, TOM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JAN-28-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONNELL, TOM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WORKMAN, GEOFFREY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ST. FRANCIS BAY HOA C/O EUGENE BERGER AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST TOM CONNELL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ALSO, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST EUGENE BURGER MANAGEMENT COMPANY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
